prefer vertical scroll","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etap-delay\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use touch-action: manipulation to reduce 300ms delay (Web)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estandard-gestures\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use platform standard gestures consistently; don\u0026#39;t redefine (e.g. swipe-back, pinch-zoom) (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esystem-gestures\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Don\u0026#39;t block system gestures (Control Center, back swipe, etc.) (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epress-feedback\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Visual feedback on press (ripple/highlight; MD state layers)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ehaptic-feedback\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use haptic for confirmations and important actions; avoid overuse (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003egesture-alternative\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Don\u0026#39;t rely on gesture-only interactions; always provide visible controls for critical actions","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esafe-area-awareness\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Keep primary touch targets away from notch, Dynamic Island, gesture bar and screen edges","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eno-precision-required\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Avoid requiring pixel-perfect taps on small icons or thin edges","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eswipe-clarity\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Swipe actions must show clear affordance or hint (chevron, label, tutorial)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edrag-threshold\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use a movement threshold before starting drag to avoid accidental drags","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-mh\"\u003e### \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e3. Performance (HIGH)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eimage-optimization\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use WebP/AVIF, responsive images (srcset/sizes), lazy load non-critical assets","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eimage-dimension\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Declare width/height or use aspect-ratio to prevent layout shift (Core Web Vitals: CLS)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efont-loading\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use font-display: swap/optional to avoid invisible text (FOIT); reserve space to reduce layout shift (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efont-preload\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Preload only critical fonts; avoid overusing preload on every variant","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecritical-css\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Prioritize above-the-fold CSS (inline critical CSS or early-loaded stylesheet)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elazy-loading\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Lazy load non-hero components via dynamic import / route-level splitting","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebundle-splitting\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Split code by route/feature (React Suspense / Next.js dynamic) to reduce initial load and TTI","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ethird-party-scripts\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Load third-party scripts async/defer; audit and remove unnecessary ones (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ereduce-reflows\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Avoid frequent layout reads/writes; batch DOM reads then writes","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtent-jumping\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Reserve space for async content to avoid layout jumps (Core Web Vitals: CLS)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elazy-load-below-fold\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use loading=\u0026quot;lazy\u0026quot; for below-the-fold images and heavy media","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003evirtualize-lists\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Virtualize lists with 50+ items to improve memory efficiency and scroll performance","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emain-thread-budget\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Keep per-frame work under \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e~\u003c/span\u003e16ms for 60fps; move heavy tasks off main thread (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eprogressive-loading\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use skeleton screens / shimmer instead of long blocking spinners for \u0026gt;1s operations (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einput-latency\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Keep input latency under \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e~\u003c/span\u003e100ms for taps/scrolls (Material responsiveness standard)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etap-feedback-speed\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Provide visual feedback within 100ms of tap (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edebounce-throttle\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use debounce/throttle for high-frequency events (scroll, resize, input)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eoffline-support\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Provide offline state messaging and basic fallback (PWA / mobile)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enetwork-fallback\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Offer degraded modes for slow networks (lower-res images, fewer animations)","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-mh\"\u003e### \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e4. Style Selection (HIGH)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estyle-match\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Match style to product type (use \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e--design-system\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e for recommendations)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econsistency\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use same style across all pages","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eno-emoji-icons\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use SVG icons (Heroicons, Lucide), not emojis","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecolor-palette-from-product\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Choose palette from product/industry (search \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e--domain color\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeffects-match-style\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Shadows, blur, radius aligned with chosen style (glass / flat / clay etc.)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eplatform-adaptive\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Respect platform idioms (iOS HIG vs Material): navigation, controls, typography, motion","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estate-clarity\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Make hover/pressed/disabled states visually distinct while staying on-style (Material state layers)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eelevation-consistent\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use a consistent elevation/shadow scale for cards, sheets, modals; avoid random shadow values","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edark-mode-pairing\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Design light/dark variants together to keep brand, contrast, and style consistent","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eicon-style-consistent\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use one icon set/visual language (stroke width, corner radius) across the product","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esystem-controls\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Prefer native/system controls over fully custom ones; only customize when branding requires it (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eblur-purpose\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use blur to indicate background dismissal (modals, sheets), not as decoration (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eprimary-action\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Each screen should have only one primary CTA; secondary actions visually subordinate (Apple HIG)","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-mh\"\u003e### \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e5. Layout \u0026amp; Responsive (HIGH)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eviewport-meta\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - width=device-width initial-scale=1 (never disable zoom)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emobile-first\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Design mobile-first, then scale up to tablet and desktop","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebreakpoint-consistency\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use systematic breakpoints (e.g. 375 / 768 / 1024 / 1440)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ereadable-font-size\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Minimum 16px body text on mobile (avoids iOS auto-zoom)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eline-length-control\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Mobile 35–60 chars per line; desktop 60–75 chars","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ehorizontal-scroll\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - No horizontal scroll on mobile; ensure content fits viewport width","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003espacing-scale\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use 4pt/8dp incremental spacing system (Material Design)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etouch-density\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Keep component spacing comfortable for touch: not cramped, not causing mis-taps","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtainer-width\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Consistent max-width on desktop (max-w-6xl / 7xl)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ez-index-management\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Define layered z-index scale (e.g. 0 / 10 / 20 / 40 / 100 / 1000)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efixed-element-offset\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Fixed navbar/bottom bar must reserve safe padding for underlying content","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003escroll-behavior\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Avoid nested scroll regions that interfere with the main scroll experience","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eviewport-units\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Prefer min-h-dvh over 100vh on mobile","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eorientation-support\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Keep layout readable and operable in landscape mode","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtent-priority\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Show core content first on mobile; fold or hide secondary content","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003evisual-hierarchy\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Establish hierarchy via size, spacing, contrast — not color alone","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-mh\"\u003e### \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e6. Typography \u0026amp; Color (MEDIUM)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eline-height\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use 1.5-1.75 for body text","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eline-length\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Limit to 65-75 characters per line","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efont-pairing\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Match heading/body font personalities","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efont-scale\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Consistent type scale (e.g. 12 14 16 18 24 32)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtrast-readability\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Darker text on light backgrounds (e.g. slate-900 on white)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etext-styles-system\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use platform type system: iOS 11 Dynamic Type styles / Material 5 type roles (display, headline, title, body, label) (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eweight-hierarchy\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use font-weight to reinforce hierarchy: Bold headings (600–700), Regular body (400), Medium labels (500) (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecolor-semantic\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Define semantic color tokens (primary, secondary, error, surface, on-surface) not raw hex in components (Material color system)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecolor-dark-mode\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Dark mode uses desaturated / lighter tonal variants, not inverted colors; test contrast separately (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecolor-accessible-pairs\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Foreground/background pairs must meet 4.5:1 (AA) or 7:1 (AAA); use tools to verify (WCAG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecolor-not-decorative-only\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Functional color (error red, success green) must include icon/text; avoid color-only meaning (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etruncation-strategy\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Prefer wrapping over truncation; when truncating use ellipsis and provide full text via tooltip/expand (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eletter-spacing\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Respect default letter-spacing per platform; avoid tight tracking on body text (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enumber-tabular\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use tabular/monospaced figures for data columns, prices, and timers to prevent layout shift","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ewhitespace-balance\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use whitespace intentionally to group related items and separate sections; avoid visual clutter (Apple HIG)","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-mh\"\u003e### \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e7. Animation (MEDIUM)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eduration-timing\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use 150–300ms for micro-interactions; complex transitions ≤400ms; avoid \u0026gt;500ms (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etransform-performance\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use transform/opacity only; avoid animating width/height/top/left","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eloading-states\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Show skeleton or progress indicator when loading exceeds 300ms","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eexcessive-motion\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Animate 1-2 key elements per view max","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeasing\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use ease-out for entering, ease-in for exiting; avoid linear for UI transitions","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emotion-meaning\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Every animation must express a cause-effect relationship, not just be decorative (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estate-transition\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - State changes (hover / active / expanded / collapsed / modal) should animate smoothly, not snap","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtinuity\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Page/screen transitions should maintain spatial continuity (shared element, directional slide) (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eparallax-subtle\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use parallax sparingly; must respect reduced-motion and not cause disorientation (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003espring-physics\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Prefer spring/physics-based curves over linear or cubic-bezier for natural feel (Apple HIG fluid animations)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eexit-faster-than-enter\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Exit animations shorter than enter (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e~\u003c/span\u003e60–70% of enter duration) to feel responsive (MD motion)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estagger-sequence\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Stagger list/grid item entrance by 30–50ms per item; avoid all-at-once or too-slow reveals (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eshared-element-transition\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use shared element / hero transitions for visual continuity between screens (MD, HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einterruptible\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Animations must be interruptible; user tap/gesture cancels in-progress animation immediately (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eno-blocking-animation\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Never block user input during an animation; UI must stay interactive (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efade-crossfade\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use crossfade for content replacement within the same container (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003escale-feedback\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Subtle scale (0.95–1.05) on press for tappable cards/buttons; restore on release (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003egesture-feedback\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Drag, swipe, and pinch must provide real-time visual response tracking the finger (MD Motion)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ehierarchy-motion\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use translate/scale direction to express hierarchy: enter from below = deeper, exit upward = back (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emotion-consistency\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Unify duration/easing tokens globally; all animations share the same rhythm and feel","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eopacity-threshold\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Fading elements should not linger below opacity 0.2; either fade fully or remain visible","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emodal-motion\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Modals/sheets should animate from their trigger source (scale+fade or slide-in) for spatial context (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enavigation-direction\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Forward navigation animates left/up; backward animates right/down — keep direction logically consistent (HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elayout-shift-avoid\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Animations must not cause layout reflow or CLS; use transform for position changes","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-mh\"\u003e### \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e8. Forms \u0026amp; Feedback (MEDIUM)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einput-labels\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Visible label per input (not placeholder-only)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eerror-placement\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Show error below the related field","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esubmit-feedback\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Loading then success/error state on submit","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003erequired-indicators\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Mark required fields (e.g. asterisk)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty-states\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Helpful message and action when no content","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etoast-dismiss\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Auto-dismiss toasts in 3-5s","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econfirmation-dialogs\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Confirm before destructive actions","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einput-helper-text\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Provide persistent helper text below complex inputs, not just placeholder (Material Design)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edisabled-states\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Disabled elements use reduced opacity (0.38–0.5) + cursor change + semantic attribute (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eprogressive-disclosure\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Reveal complex options progressively; don\u0026#39;t overwhelm users upfront (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einline-validation\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Validate on blur (not keystroke); show error only after user finishes input (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einput-type-keyboard\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use semantic input types (email, tel, number) to trigger the correct mobile keyboard (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epassword-toggle\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Provide show/hide toggle for password fields (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eautofill-support\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use autocomplete / textContentType attributes so the system can autofill (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eundo-support\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Allow undo for destructive or bulk actions (e.g. \u0026quot;Undo delete\u0026quot; toast) (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esuccess-feedback\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Confirm completed actions with brief visual feedback (checkmark, toast, color flash) (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eerror-recovery\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Error messages must include a clear recovery path (retry, edit, help link) (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emulti-step-progress\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Multi-step flows show step indicator or progress bar; allow back navigation (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eform-autosave\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Long forms should auto-save drafts to prevent data loss on accidental dismissal (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esheet-dismiss-confirm\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Confirm before dismissing a sheet/modal with unsaved changes (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eerror-clarity\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Error messages must state cause + how to fix (not just \u0026quot;Invalid input\u0026quot;) (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efield-grouping\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Group related fields logically (fieldset/legend or visual grouping) (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eread-only-distinction\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Read-only state should be visually and semantically different from disabled (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efocus-management\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - After submit error, auto-focus the first invalid field (WCAG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eerror-summary\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - For multiple errors, show summary at top with anchor links to each field (WCAG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etouch-friendly-input\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Mobile input height ≥44px to meet touch target requirements (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edestructive-emphasis\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Destructive actions use semantic danger color (red) and are visually separated from primary actions (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etoast-accessibility\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Toasts must not steal focus; use aria-live=\u0026quot;polite\u0026quot; for screen reader announcement (WCAG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003earia-live-errors\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Form errors use aria-live region or role=\u0026quot;alert\u0026quot; to notify screen readers (WCAG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtrast-feedback\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Error and success state colors must meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio (WCAG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etimeout-feedback\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Request timeout must show clear feedback with retry option (MD)","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-mh\"\u003e### \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e9. Navigation Patterns (HIGH)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebottom-nav-limit\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Bottom navigation max 5 items; use labels with icons (Material Design)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edrawer-usage\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use drawer/sidebar for secondary navigation, not primary actions (Material Design)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback-behavior\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Back navigation must be predictable and consistent; preserve scroll/state (Apple HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edeep-linking\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - All key screens must be reachable via deep link / URL for sharing and notifications (Apple HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etab-bar-ios\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - iOS: use bottom Tab Bar for top-level navigation (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etop-app-bar-android\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Android: use Top App Bar with navigation icon for primary structure (Material Design)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enav-label-icon\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Navigation items must have both icon and text label; icon-only nav harms discoverability (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enav-state-active\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Current location must be visually highlighted (color, weight, indicator) in navigation (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enav-hierarchy\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Primary nav (tabs/bottom bar) vs secondary nav (drawer/settings) must be clearly separated (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emodal-escape\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Modals and sheets must offer a clear close/dismiss affordance; swipe-down to dismiss on mobile (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esearch-accessible\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Search must be easily reachable (top bar or tab); provide recent/suggested queries (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebreadcrumb-web\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Web: use breadcrumbs for 3+ level deep hierarchies to aid orientation (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estate-preservation\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Navigating back must restore previous scroll position, filter state, and input (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003egesture-nav-support\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Support system gesture navigation (iOS swipe-back, Android predictive back) without conflict (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etab-badge\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use badges on nav items sparingly to indicate unread/pending; clear after user visits (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eoverflow-menu\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - When actions exceed available space, use overflow/more menu instead of cramming (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebottom-nav-top-level\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Bottom nav is for top-level screens only; never nest sub-navigation inside it (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eadaptive-navigation\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Large screens (≥1024px) prefer sidebar; small screens use bottom/top nav (Material Adaptive)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback-stack-integrity\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Never silently reset the navigation stack or unexpectedly jump to home (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enavigation-consistency\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Navigation placement must stay the same across all pages; don\u0026#39;t change by page type","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eavoid-mixed-patterns\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Don\u0026#39;t mix Tab + Sidebar + Bottom Nav at the same hierarchy level","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emodal-vs-navigation\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Modals must not be used for primary navigation flows; they break the user\u0026#39;s path (HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efocus-on-route-change\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - After page transition, move focus to main content region for screen reader users (WCAG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epersistent-nav\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Core navigation must remain reachable from deep pages; don\u0026#39;t hide it entirely in sub-flows (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edestructive-nav-separation\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Dangerous actions (delete account, logout) must be visually and spatially separated from normal nav items (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty-nav-state\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - When a nav destination is unavailable, explain why instead of silently hiding it (MD)","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-mh\"\u003e### \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e10. Charts \u0026amp; Data (LOW)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e","","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003echart-type\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Match chart type to data type (trend → line, comparison → bar, proportion → pie/donut)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecolor-guidance\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use accessible color palettes; avoid red/green only pairs for colorblind users (WCAG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edata-table\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Provide table alternative for accessibility; charts alone are not screen-reader friendly (WCAG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epattern-texture\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Supplement color with patterns, textures, or shapes so data is distinguishable without color (WCAG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elegend-visible\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Always show legend; position near the chart, not detached below a scroll fold (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etooltip-on-interact\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Provide tooltips/data labels on hover (Web) or tap (mobile) showing exact values (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eaxis-labels\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Label axes with units and readable scale; avoid truncated or rotated labels on mobile","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eresponsive-chart\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Charts must reflow or simplify on small screens (e.g. horizontal bar instead of vertical, fewer ticks)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty-data-state\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Show meaningful empty state when no data exists (\u0026quot;No data yet\u0026quot; + guidance), not a blank chart (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eloading-chart\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use skeleton or shimmer placeholder while chart data loads; don\u0026#39;t show an empty axis frame","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanimation-optional\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Chart entrance animations must respect prefers-reduced-motion; data should be readable immediately (HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elarge-dataset\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - For 1000+ data points, aggregate or sample; provide drill-down for detail instead of rendering all (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enumber-formatting\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Use locale-aware formatting for numbers, dates, currencies on axes and labels (HIG, MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etouch-target-chart\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Interactive chart elements (points, segments) must have ≥44pt tap area or expand on touch (Apple HIG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eno-pie-overuse\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Avoid pie/donut for \u0026gt;5 categories; switch to bar chart for clarity","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtrast-data\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Data lines/bars vs background ≥3:1; data text labels ≥4.5:1 (WCAG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elegend-interactive\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Legends should be clickable to toggle series visibility (MD)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edirect-labeling\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - For small datasets, label values directly on the chart to reduce eye travel","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etooltip-keyboard\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Tooltip content must be keyboard-reachable and not rely on hover alone (WCAG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esortable-table\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e - Data tables must support sorting with aria-sort indicating current sort state (WCAG)","\u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e`\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e Raster PNG icons that blur or pixelate. \u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e Ensures scalability, crisp rendering, and dark/light mode bounds. \u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e Layout-shifting transforms that move surrounding content or trigger visual jitter. \u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e**\u003c/span\u003eStroke Consistency\u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e Mixing thick and thin stroke styles arbitrarily. \u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e Inconsistent strokes reduce perceived polish and cohesion. \u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e**\u003c/span\u003eFilled vs Outline Discipline\u003cspan outline icons at the same hierarchy level. \u003cspan class=\"pl-ml\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e Maintains semantic clarity and stylistic coherence. \u003cspan
