itemprop="text"><markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
  <thead>
  <tr>
  <th>name</th>
  <th>description</th>
  </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
  <tr>
  <td><div dir="auto">ui-ux-pro-max</div></td>
  <td><div dir="auto">UI/UX design intelligence for web and mobile. Includes 50+ styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 161 product types, 99 UX guidelines, and 25 chart types across 10 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and HTML/CSS). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, and check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, and mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, and chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, and flat design. Topics: color systems, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, interaction states, shadow, and gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.</div></td>
  </tr>
  </tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">UI/UX Pro Max - Design Intelligence</h1><a id="user-content-uiux-pro-max---design-intelligence" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: UI/UX Pro Max - Design Intelligence" href="#uiux-pro-max---design-intelligence"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Comprehensive design guide for web and mobile applications. Contains 50+ styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 161 product types with reasoning rules, 99 UX guidelines, and 25 chart types across 10 technology stacks. Searchable database with priority-based recommendations.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">When to Apply</h2><a id="user-content-when-to-apply" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: When to Apply" href="#when-to-apply"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This Skill should be used when the task involves <strong>UI structure, visual design decisions, interaction patterns, or user experience quality control</strong>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Must Use</h3><a id="user-content-must-use" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Must Use" href="#must-use"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This Skill must be invoked in the following situations:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Designing new pages (Landing Page, Dashboard, Admin, SaaS, Mobile App)</li>
<li>Creating or refactoring UI components (buttons, modals, forms, tables, charts, etc.)</li>
<li>Choosing color schemes, typography systems, spacing standards, or layout systems</li>
<li>Reviewing UI code for user experience, accessibility, or visual consistency</li>
<li>Implementing navigation structures, animations, or responsive behavior</li>
<li>Making product-level design decisions (style, information hierarchy, brand expression)</li>
<li>Improving perceived quality, clarity, or usability of interfaces</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Recommended</h3><a id="user-content-recommended" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Recommended" href="#recommended"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This Skill is recommended in the following situations:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>UI looks "not professional enough" but the reason is unclear</li>
<li>Receiving feedback on usability or experience</li>
<li>Pre-launch UI quality optimization</li>
<li>Aligning cross-platform design (Web / iOS / Android)</li>
<li>Building design systems or reusable component libraries</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Skip</h3><a id="user-content-skip" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Skip" href="#skip"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This Skill is not needed in the following situations:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Pure backend logic development</li>
<li>Only involving API or database design</li>
<li>Performance optimization unrelated to the interface</li>
<li>Infrastructure or DevOps work</li>
<li>Non-visual scripts or automation tasks</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Decision criteria</strong>: If the task will change how a feature <strong>looks, feels, moves, or is interacted with</strong>, this Skill should be used.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Rule Categories by Priority</h2><a id="user-content-rule-categories-by-priority" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Rule Categories by Priority" href="#rule-categories-by-priority"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><em>For human/AI reference: follow priority 1→10 to decide which rule category to focus on first; use <code>--domain &lt;Domain&gt;</code> to query details when needed. Scripts do not read this table.</em></p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Priority</th>
<th>Category</th>
<th>Impact</th>
<th>Domain</th>
<th>Key Checks (Must Have)</th>
<th>Anti-Patterns (Avoid)</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Accessibility</td>
<td>CRITICAL</td>
<td><code>ux</code></td>
<td>Contrast 4.5:1, Alt text, Keyboard nav, Aria-labels</td>
<td>Removing focus rings, Icon-only buttons without labels</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Touch &amp; Interaction</td>
<td>CRITICAL</td>
<td><code>ux</code></td>
<td>Min size 44×44px, 8px+ spacing, Loading feedback</td>
<td>Reliance on hover only, Instant state changes (0ms)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Performance</td>
<td>HIGH</td>
<td><code>ux</code></td>
<td>WebP/AVIF, Lazy loading, Reserve space (CLS &lt; 0.1)</td>
<td>Layout thrashing, Cumulative Layout Shift</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Style Selection</td>
<td>HIGH</td>
<td><code>style</code>, <code>product</code></td>
<td>Match product type, Consistency, SVG icons (no emoji)</td>
<td>Mixing flat &amp; skeuomorphic randomly, Emoji as icons</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Layout &amp; Responsive</td>
<td>HIGH</td>
<td><code>ux</code></td>
<td>Mobile-first breakpoints, Viewport meta, No horizontal scroll</td>
<td>Horizontal scroll, Fixed px container widths, Disable zoom</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Typography &amp; Color</td>
<td>MEDIUM</td>
<td><code>typography</code>, <code>color</code></td>
<td>Base 16px, Line-height 1.5, Semantic color tokens</td>
<td>Text &lt; 12px body, Gray-on-gray, Raw hex in components</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Animation</td>
<td>MEDIUM</td>
<td><code>ux</code></td>
<td>Duration 150–300ms, Motion conveys meaning, Spatial continuity</td>
<td>Decorative-only animation, Animating width/height, No reduced-motion</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>Forms &amp; Feedback</td>
<td>MEDIUM</td>
<td><code>ux</code></td>
<td>Visible labels, Error near field, Helper text, Progressive disclosure</td>
<td>Placeholder-only label, Errors only at top, Overwhelm upfront</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>Navigation Patterns</td>
<td>HIGH</td>
<td><code>ux</code></td>
<td>Predictable back, Bottom nav ≤5, Deep linking</td>
<td>Overloaded nav, Broken back behavior, No deep links</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>10</td>
<td>Charts &amp; Data</td>
<td>LOW</td>
<td><code>chart</code></td>
<td>Legends, Tooltips, Accessible colors</td>
<td>Relying on color alone to convey meaning</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Quick Reference</h2><a id="user-content-quick-reference" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Quick Reference" href="#quick-reference"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. Accessibility (CRITICAL)</h3><a id="user-content-1-accessibility-critical" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. Accessibility (CRITICAL)" href="#1-accessibility-critical"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>color-contrast</code> - Minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text (large text 3:1); Material Design</li>
<li><code>focus-states</code> - Visible focus rings on interactive elements (2–4px; Apple HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>alt-text</code> - Descriptive alt text for meaningful images</li>
<li><code>aria-labels</code> - aria-label for icon-only buttons; accessibilityLabel in native (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>keyboard-nav</code> - Tab order matches visual order; full keyboard support (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>form-labels</code> - Use label with for attribute</li>
<li><code>skip-links</code> - Skip to main content for keyboard users</li>
<li><code>heading-hierarchy</code> - Sequential h1→h6, no level skip</li>
<li><code>color-not-only</code> - Don't convey info by color alone (add icon/text)</li>
<li><code>dynamic-type</code> - Support system text scaling; avoid truncation as text grows (Apple Dynamic Type, MD)</li>
<li><code>reduced-motion</code> - Respect prefers-reduced-motion; reduce/disable animations when requested (Apple Reduced Motion API, MD)</li>
<li><code>voiceover-sr</code> - Meaningful accessibilityLabel/accessibilityHint; logical reading order for VoiceOver/screen readers (Apple HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>escape-routes</code> - Provide cancel/back in modals and multi-step flows (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>keyboard-shortcuts</code> - Preserve system and a11y shortcuts; offer keyboard alternatives for drag-and-drop (Apple HIG)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Touch &amp; Interaction (CRITICAL)</h3><a id="user-content-2-touch--interaction-critical" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. Touch &amp; Interaction (CRITICAL)" href="#2-touch--interaction-critical"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>touch-target-size</code> - Min 44×44pt (Apple) / 48×48dp (Material); extend hit area beyond visual bounds if needed</li>
<li><code>touch-spacing</code> - Minimum 8px/8dp gap between touch targets (Apple HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>hover-vs-tap</code> - Use click/tap for primary interactions; don't rely on hover alone</li>
<li><code>loading-buttons</code> - Disable button during async operations; show spinner or progress</li>
<li><code>error-feedback</code> - Clear error messages near problem</li>
<li><code>cursor-pointer</code> - Add cursor-pointer to clickable elements (Web)</li>
<li><code>gesture-conflicts</code> - Avoid horizontal swipe on main content; prefer vertical scroll</li>
<li><code>tap-delay</code> - Use touch-action: manipulation to reduce 300ms delay (Web)</li>
<li><code>standard-gestures</code> - Use platform standard gestures consistently; don't redefine (e.g. swipe-back, pinch-zoom) (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>system-gestures</code> - Don't block system gestures (Control Center, back swipe, etc.) (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>press-feedback</code> - Visual feedback on press (ripple/highlight; MD state layers)</li>
<li><code>haptic-feedback</code> - Use haptic for confirmations and important actions; avoid overuse (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>gesture-alternative</code> - Don't rely on gesture-only interactions; always provide visible controls for critical actions</li>
<li><code>safe-area-awareness</code> - Keep primary touch targets away from notch, Dynamic Island, gesture bar and screen edges</li>
<li><code>no-precision-required</code> - Avoid requiring pixel-perfect taps on small icons or thin edges</li>
<li><code>swipe-clarity</code> - Swipe actions must show clear affordance or hint (chevron, label, tutorial)</li>
<li><code>drag-threshold</code> - Use a movement threshold before starting drag to avoid accidental drags</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">3. Performance (HIGH)</h3><a id="user-content-3-performance-high" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3. Performance (HIGH)" href="#3-performance-high"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>image-optimization</code> - Use WebP/AVIF, responsive images (srcset/sizes), lazy load non-critical assets</li>
<li><code>image-dimension</code> - Declare width/height or use aspect-ratio to prevent layout shift (Core Web Vitals: CLS)</li>
<li><code>font-loading</code> - Use font-display: swap/optional to avoid invisible text (FOIT); reserve space to reduce layout shift (MD)</li>
<li><code>font-preload</code> - Preload only critical fonts; avoid overusing preload on every variant</li>
<li><code>critical-css</code> - Prioritize above-the-fold CSS (inline critical CSS or early-loaded stylesheet)</li>
<li><code>lazy-loading</code> - Lazy load non-hero components via dynamic import / route-level splitting</li>
<li><code>bundle-splitting</code> - Split code by route/feature (React Suspense / Next.js dynamic) to reduce initial load and TTI</li>
<li><code>third-party-scripts</code> - Load third-party scripts async/defer; audit and remove unnecessary ones (MD)</li>
<li><code>reduce-reflows</code> - Avoid frequent layout reads/writes; batch DOM reads then writes</li>
<li><code>content-jumping</code> - Reserve space for async content to avoid layout jumps (Core Web Vitals: CLS)</li>
<li><code>lazy-load-below-fold</code> - Use loading="lazy" for below-the-fold images and heavy media</li>
<li><code>virtualize-lists</code> - Virtualize lists with 50+ items to improve memory efficiency and scroll performance</li>
<li><code>main-thread-budget</code> - Keep per-frame work under ~16ms for 60fps; move heavy tasks off main thread (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>progressive-loading</code> - Use skeleton screens / shimmer instead of long blocking spinners for &gt;1s operations (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>input-latency</code> - Keep input latency under ~100ms for taps/scrolls (Material responsiveness standard)</li>
<li><code>tap-feedback-speed</code> - Provide visual feedback within 100ms of tap (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>debounce-throttle</code> - Use debounce/throttle for high-frequency events (scroll, resize, input)</li>
<li><code>offline-support</code> - Provide offline state messaging and basic fallback (PWA / mobile)</li>
<li><code>network-fallback</code> - Offer degraded modes for slow networks (lower-res images, fewer animations)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Style Selection (HIGH)</h3><a id="user-content-4-style-selection-high" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Style Selection (HIGH)" href="#4-style-selection-high"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>style-match</code> - Match style to product type (use <code>--design-system</code> for recommendations)</li>
<li><code>consistency</code> - Use same style across all pages</li>
<li><code>no-emoji-icons</code> - Use SVG icons (Heroicons, Lucide), not emojis</li>
<li><code>color-palette-from-product</code> - Choose palette from product/industry (search <code>--domain color</code>)</li>
<li><code>effects-match-style</code> - Shadows, blur, radius aligned with chosen style (glass / flat / clay etc.)</li>
<li><code>platform-adaptive</code> - Respect platform idioms (iOS HIG vs Material): navigation, controls, typography, motion</li>
<li><code>state-clarity</code> - Make hover/pressed/disabled states visually distinct while staying on-style (Material state layers)</li>
<li><code>elevation-consistent</code> - Use a consistent elevation/shadow scale for cards, sheets, modals; avoid random shadow values</li>
<li><code>dark-mode-pairing</code> - Design light/dark variants together to keep brand, contrast, and style consistent</li>
<li><code>icon-style-consistent</code> - Use one icon set/visual language (stroke width, corner radius) across the product</li>
<li><code>system-controls</code> - Prefer native/system controls over fully custom ones; only customize when branding requires it (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>blur-purpose</code> - Use blur to indicate background dismissal (modals, sheets), not as decoration (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>primary-action</code> - Each screen should have only one primary CTA; secondary actions visually subordinate (Apple HIG)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">5. Layout &amp; Responsive (HIGH)</h3><a id="user-content-5-layout--responsive-high" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 5. Layout &amp; Responsive (HIGH)" href="#5-layout--responsive-high"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>viewport-meta</code> - width=device-width initial-scale=1 (never disable zoom)</li>
<li><code>mobile-first</code> - Design mobile-first, then scale up to tablet and desktop</li>
<li><code>breakpoint-consistency</code> - Use systematic breakpoints (e.g. 375 / 768 / 1024 / 1440)</li>
<li><code>readable-font-size</code> - Minimum 16px body text on mobile (avoids iOS auto-zoom)</li>
<li><code>line-length-control</code> - Mobile 35–60 chars per line; desktop 60–75 chars</li>
<li><code>horizontal-scroll</code> - No horizontal scroll on mobile; ensure content fits viewport width</li>
<li><code>spacing-scale</code> - Use 4pt/8dp incremental spacing system (Material Design)</li>
<li><code>touch-density</code> - Keep component spacing comfortable for touch: not cramped, not causing mis-taps</li>
<li><code>container-width</code> - Consistent max-width on desktop (max-w-6xl / 7xl)</li>
<li><code>z-index-management</code> - Define layered z-index scale (e.g. 0 / 10 / 20 / 40 / 100 / 1000)</li>
<li><code>fixed-element-offset</code> - Fixed navbar/bottom bar must reserve safe padding for underlying content</li>
<li><code>scroll-behavior</code> - Avoid nested scroll regions that interfere with the main scroll experience</li>
<li><code>viewport-units</code> - Prefer min-h-dvh over 100vh on mobile</li>
<li><code>orientation-support</code> - Keep layout readable and operable in landscape mode</li>
<li><code>content-priority</code> - Show core content first on mobile; fold or hide secondary content</li>
<li><code>visual-hierarchy</code> - Establish hierarchy via size, spacing, contrast — not color alone</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">6. Typography &amp; Color (MEDIUM)</h3><a id="user-content-6-typography--color-medium" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 6. Typography &amp; Color (MEDIUM)" href="#6-typography--color-medium"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>line-height</code> - Use 1.5-1.75 for body text</li>
<li><code>line-length</code> - Limit to 65-75 characters per line</li>
<li><code>font-pairing</code> - Match heading/body font personalities</li>
<li><code>font-scale</code> - Consistent type scale (e.g. 12 14 16 18 24 32)</li>
<li><code>contrast-readability</code> - Darker text on light backgrounds (e.g. slate-900 on white)</li>
<li><code>text-styles-system</code> - Use platform type system: iOS 11 Dynamic Type styles / Material 5 type roles (display, headline, title, body, label) (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>weight-hierarchy</code> - Use font-weight to reinforce hierarchy: Bold headings (600–700), Regular body (400), Medium labels (500) (MD)</li>
<li><code>color-semantic</code> - Define semantic color tokens (primary, secondary, error, surface, on-surface) not raw hex in components (Material color system)</li>
<li><code>color-dark-mode</code> - Dark mode uses desaturated / lighter tonal variants, not inverted colors; test contrast separately (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>color-accessible-pairs</code> - Foreground/background pairs must meet 4.5:1 (AA) or 7:1 (AAA); use tools to verify (WCAG, MD)</li>
<li><code>color-not-decorative-only</code> - Functional color (error red, success green) must include icon/text; avoid color-only meaning (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>truncation-strategy</code> - Prefer wrapping over truncation; when truncating use ellipsis and provide full text via tooltip/expand (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>letter-spacing</code> - Respect default letter-spacing per platform; avoid tight tracking on body text (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>number-tabular</code> - Use tabular/monospaced figures for data columns, prices, and timers to prevent layout shift</li>
<li><code>whitespace-balance</code> - Use whitespace intentionally to group related items and separate sections; avoid visual clutter (Apple HIG)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">7. Animation (MEDIUM)</h3><a id="user-content-7-animation-medium" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 7. Animation (MEDIUM)" href="#7-animation-medium"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>duration-timing</code> - Use 150–300ms for micro-interactions; complex transitions ≤400ms; avoid &gt;500ms (MD)</li>
<li><code>transform-performance</code> - Use transform/opacity only; avoid animating width/height/top/left</li>
<li><code>loading-states</code> - Show skeleton or progress indicator when loading exceeds 300ms</li>
<li><code>excessive-motion</code> - Animate 1-2 key elements per view max</li>
<li><code>easing</code> - Use ease-out for entering, ease-in for exiting; avoid linear for UI transitions</li>
<li><code>motion-meaning</code> - Every animation must express a cause-effect relationship, not just be decorative (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>state-transition</code> - State changes (hover / active / expanded / collapsed / modal) should animate smoothly, not snap</li>
<li><code>continuity</code> - Page/screen transitions should maintain spatial continuity (shared element, directional slide) (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>parallax-subtle</code> - Use parallax sparingly; must respect reduced-motion and not cause disorientation (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>spring-physics</code> - Prefer spring/physics-based curves over linear or cubic-bezier for natural feel (Apple HIG fluid animations)</li>
<li><code>exit-faster-than-enter</code> - Exit animations shorter than enter (~60–70% of enter duration) to feel responsive (MD motion)</li>
<li><code>stagger-sequence</code> - Stagger list/grid item entrance by 30–50ms per item; avoid all-at-once or too-slow reveals (MD)</li>
<li><code>shared-element-transition</code> - Use shared element / hero transitions for visual continuity between screens (MD, HIG)</li>
<li><code>interruptible</code> - Animations must be interruptible; user tap/gesture cancels in-progress animation immediately (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>no-blocking-animation</code> - Never block user input during an animation; UI must stay interactive (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>fade-crossfade</code> - Use crossfade for content replacement within the same container (MD)</li>
<li><code>scale-feedback</code> - Subtle scale (0.95–1.05) on press for tappable cards/buttons; restore on release (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>gesture-feedback</code> - Drag, swipe, and pinch must provide real-time visual response tracking the finger (MD Motion)</li>
<li><code>hierarchy-motion</code> - Use translate/scale direction to express hierarchy: enter from below = deeper, exit upward = back (MD)</li>
<li><code>motion-consistency</code> - Unify duration/easing tokens globally; all animations share the same rhythm and feel</li>
<li><code>opacity-threshold</code> - Fading elements should not linger below opacity 0.2; either fade fully or remain visible</li>
<li><code>modal-motion</code> - Modals/sheets should animate from their trigger source (scale+fade or slide-in) for spatial context (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>navigation-direction</code> - Forward navigation animates left/up; backward animates right/down — keep direction logically consistent (HIG)</li>
<li><code>layout-shift-avoid</code> - Animations must not cause layout reflow or CLS; use transform for position changes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">8. Forms &amp; Feedback (MEDIUM)</h3><a id="user-content-8-forms--feedback-medium" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 8. Forms &amp; Feedback (MEDIUM)" href="#8-forms--feedback-medium"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>input-labels</code> - Visible label per input (not placeholder-only)</li>
<li><code>error-placement</code> - Show error below the related field</li>
<li><code>submit-feedback</code> - Loading then success/error state on submit</li>
<li><code>required-indicators</code> - Mark required fields (e.g. asterisk)</li>
<li><code>empty-states</code> - Helpful message and action when no content</li>
<li><code>toast-dismiss</code> - Auto-dismiss toasts in 3-5s</li>
<li><code>confirmation-dialogs</code> - Confirm before destructive actions</li>
<li><code>input-helper-text</code> - Provide persistent helper text below complex inputs, not just placeholder (Material Design)</li>
<li><code>disabled-states</code> - Disabled elements use reduced opacity (0.38–0.5) + cursor change + semantic attribute (MD)</li>
<li><code>progressive-disclosure</code> - Reveal complex options progressively; don't overwhelm users upfront (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>inline-validation</code> - Validate on blur (not keystroke); show error only after user finishes input (MD)</li>
<li><code>input-type-keyboard</code> - Use semantic input types (email, tel, number) to trigger the correct mobile keyboard (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>password-toggle</code> - Provide show/hide toggle for password fields (MD)</li>
<li><code>autofill-support</code> - Use autocomplete / textContentType attributes so the system can autofill (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>undo-support</code> - Allow undo for destructive or bulk actions (e.g. "Undo delete" toast) (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>success-feedback</code> - Confirm completed actions with brief visual feedback (checkmark, toast, color flash) (MD)</li>
<li><code>error-recovery</code> - Error messages must include a clear recovery path (retry, edit, help link) (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>multi-step-progress</code> - Multi-step flows show step indicator or progress bar; allow back navigation (MD)</li>
<li><code>form-autosave</code> - Long forms should auto-save drafts to prevent data loss on accidental dismissal (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>sheet-dismiss-confirm</code> - Confirm before dismissing a sheet/modal with unsaved changes (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>error-clarity</code> - Error messages must state cause + how to fix (not just "Invalid input") (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>field-grouping</code> - Group related fields logically (fieldset/legend or visual grouping) (MD)</li>
<li><code>read-only-distinction</code> - Read-only state should be visually and semantically different from disabled (MD)</li>
<li><code>focus-management</code> - After submit error, auto-focus the first invalid field (WCAG, MD)</li>
<li><code>error-summary</code> - For multiple errors, show summary at top with anchor links to each field (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>touch-friendly-input</code> - Mobile input height ≥44px to meet touch target requirements (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>destructive-emphasis</code> - Destructive actions use semantic danger color (red) and are visually separated from primary actions (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>toast-accessibility</code> - Toasts must not steal focus; use aria-live="polite" for screen reader announcement (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>aria-live-errors</code> - Form errors use aria-live region or role="alert" to notify screen readers (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>contrast-feedback</code> - Error and success state colors must meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio (WCAG, MD)</li>
<li><code>timeout-feedback</code> - Request timeout must show clear feedback with retry option (MD)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">9. Navigation Patterns (HIGH)</h3><a id="user-content-9-navigation-patterns-high" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 9. Navigation Patterns (HIGH)" href="#9-navigation-patterns-high"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>bottom-nav-limit</code> - Bottom navigation max 5 items; use labels with icons (Material Design)</li>
<li><code>drawer-usage</code> - Use drawer/sidebar for secondary navigation, not primary actions (Material Design)</li>
<li><code>back-behavior</code> - Back navigation must be predictable and consistent; preserve scroll/state (Apple HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>deep-linking</code> - All key screens must be reachable via deep link / URL for sharing and notifications (Apple HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>tab-bar-ios</code> - iOS: use bottom Tab Bar for top-level navigation (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>top-app-bar-android</code> - Android: use Top App Bar with navigation icon for primary structure (Material Design)</li>
<li><code>nav-label-icon</code> - Navigation items must have both icon and text label; icon-only nav harms discoverability (MD)</li>
<li><code>nav-state-active</code> - Current location must be visually highlighted (color, weight, indicator) in navigation (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>nav-hierarchy</code> - Primary nav (tabs/bottom bar) vs secondary nav (drawer/settings) must be clearly separated (MD)</li>
<li><code>modal-escape</code> - Modals and sheets must offer a clear close/dismiss affordance; swipe-down to dismiss on mobile (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>search-accessible</code> - Search must be easily reachable (top bar or tab); provide recent/suggested queries (MD)</li>
<li><code>breadcrumb-web</code> - Web: use breadcrumbs for 3+ level deep hierarchies to aid orientation (MD)</li>
<li><code>state-preservation</code> - Navigating back must restore previous scroll position, filter state, and input (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>gesture-nav-support</code> - Support system gesture navigation (iOS swipe-back, Android predictive back) without conflict (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>tab-badge</code> - Use badges on nav items sparingly to indicate unread/pending; clear after user visits (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>overflow-menu</code> - When actions exceed available space, use overflow/more menu instead of cramming (MD)</li>
<li><code>bottom-nav-top-level</code> - Bottom nav is for top-level screens only; never nest sub-navigation inside it (MD)</li>
<li><code>adaptive-navigation</code> - Large screens (≥1024px) prefer sidebar; small screens use bottom/top nav (Material Adaptive)</li>
<li><code>back-stack-integrity</code> - Never silently reset the navigation stack or unexpectedly jump to home (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>navigation-consistency</code> - Navigation placement must stay the same across all pages; don't change by page type</li>
<li><code>avoid-mixed-patterns</code> - Don't mix Tab + Sidebar + Bottom Nav at the same hierarchy level</li>
<li><code>modal-vs-navigation</code> - Modals must not be used for primary navigation flows; they break the user's path (HIG)</li>
<li><code>focus-on-route-change</code> - After page transition, move focus to main content region for screen reader users (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>persistent-nav</code> - Core navigation must remain reachable from deep pages; don't hide it entirely in sub-flows (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>destructive-nav-separation</code> - Dangerous actions (delete account, logout) must be visually and spatially separated from normal nav items (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>empty-nav-state</code> - When a nav destination is unavailable, explain why instead of silently hiding it (MD)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">10. Charts &amp; Data (LOW)</h3><a id="user-content-10-charts--data-low" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 10. Charts &amp; Data (LOW)" href="#10-charts--data-low"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>chart-type</code> - Match chart type to data type (trend → line, comparison → bar, proportion → pie/donut)</li>
<li><code>color-guidance</code> - Use accessible color palettes; avoid red/green only pairs for colorblind users (WCAG, MD)</li>
<li><code>data-table</code> - Provide table alternative for accessibility; charts alone are not screen-reader friendly (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>pattern-texture</code> - Supplement color with patterns, textures, or shapes so data is distinguishable without color (WCAG, MD)</li>
<li><code>legend-visible</code> - Always show legend; position near the chart, not detached below a scroll fold (MD)</li>
<li><code>tooltip-on-interact</code> - Provide tooltips/data labels on hover (Web) or tap (mobile) showing exact values (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>axis-labels</code> - Label axes with units and readable scale; avoid truncated or rotated labels on mobile</li>
<li><code>responsive-chart</code> - Charts must reflow or simplify on small screens (e.g. horizontal bar instead of vertical, fewer ticks)</li>
<li><code>empty-data-state</code> - Show meaningful empty state when no data exists ("No data yet" + guidance), not a blank chart (MD)</li>
<li><code>loading-chart</code> - Use skeleton or shimmer placeholder while chart data loads; don't show an empty axis frame</li>
<li><code>animation-optional</code> - Chart entrance animations must respect prefers-reduced-motion; data should be readable immediately (HIG)</li>
<li><code>large-dataset</code> - For 1000+ data points, aggregate or sample; provide drill-down for detail instead of rendering all (MD)</li>
<li><code>number-formatting</code> - Use locale-aware formatting for numbers, dates, currencies on axes and labels (HIG, MD)</li>
<li><code>touch-target-chart</code> - Interactive chart elements (points, segments) must have ≥44pt tap area or expand on touch (Apple HIG)</li>
<li><code>no-pie-overuse</code> - Avoid pie/donut for &gt;5 categories; switch to bar chart for clarity</li>
<li><code>contrast-data</code> - Data lines/bars vs background ≥3:1; data text labels ≥4.5:1 (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>legend-interactive</code> - Legends should be clickable to toggle series visibility (MD)</li>
<li><code>direct-labeling</code> - For small datasets, label values directly on the chart to reduce eye travel</li>
<li><code>tooltip-keyboard</code> - Tooltip content must be keyboard-reachable and not rely on hover alone (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>sortable-table</code> - Data tables must support sorting with aria-sort indicating current sort state (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>axis-readability</code> - Axis ticks must not be cramped; maintain readable spacing, auto-skip on small screens</li>
<li><code>data-density</code> - Limit information density per chart to avoid cognitive overload; split into multiple charts if needed</li>
<li><code>trend-emphasis</code> - Emphasize data trends over decoration; avoid heavy gradients/shadows that obscure the data</li>
<li><code>gridline-subtle</code> - Grid lines should be low-contrast (e.g. gray-200) so they don't compete with data</li>
<li><code>focusable-elements</code> - Interactive chart elements (points, bars, slices) must be keyboard-navigable (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>screen-reader-summary</code> - Provide a text summary or aria-label describing the chart's key insight for screen readers (WCAG)</li>
<li><code>error-state-chart</code> - Data load failure must show error message with retry action, not a broken/empty chart</li>
<li><code>export-option</code> - For data-heavy products, offer CSV/image export of chart data</li>
<li><code>drill-down-consistency</code> - Drill-down interactions must maintain a clear back-path and hierarchy breadcrumb</li>
<li><code>time-scale-clarity</code> - Time series charts must clearly label time granularity (day/week/month) and allow switching</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">How to Use</h2><a id="user-content-how-to-use" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How to Use" href="#how-to-use"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Search specific domains using the CLI tool below.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Prerequisites</h2><a id="user-content-prerequisites" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Prerequisites" href="#prerequisites"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Check if Python is installed:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="python3 --version || python --version"><pre>python3 --version <span class="pl-k">||</span> python --version</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">If Python is not installed, install it based on user's OS:</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>macOS:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="brew install python3"><pre>brew install python3</pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Ubuntu/Debian:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="sudo apt update &amp;&amp; sudo apt install python3"><pre>sudo apt update <span class="pl-k">&amp;&amp;</span> sudo apt install python3</pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Windows:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-powershell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="winget install Python.Python.3.12"><pre>winget install Python.Python.<span class="pl-c1">3.12</span></pre></div>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">How to Use This Skill</h2><a id="user-content-how-to-use-this-skill" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How to Use This Skill" href="#how-to-use-this-skill"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Use this skill when the user requests any of the following:</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Scenario</th>
<th>Trigger Examples</th>
<th>Start From</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>New project / page</strong></td>
<td>"Build a landing page", "Build a dashboard"</td>
<td>Step 1 → Step 2 (design system)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>New component</strong></td>
<td>"Create a pricing card", "Add a modal"</td>
<td>Step 3 (domain search: style, ux)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Choose style / color / font</strong></td>
<td>"What style fits a fintech app?", "Recommend a color palette"</td>
<td>Step 2 (design system)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Review existing UI</strong></td>
<td>"Review this page for UX issues", "Check accessibility"</td>
<td>Quick Reference checklist above</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Fix a UI bug</strong></td>
<td>"Button hover is broken", "Layout shifts on load"</td>
<td>Quick Reference → relevant section</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Improve / optimize</strong></td>
<td>"Make this faster", "Improve mobile experience"</td>
<td>Step 3 (domain search: ux, react)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Implement dark mode</strong></td>
<td>"Add dark mode support"</td>
<td>Step 3 (domain: style "dark mode")</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Add charts / data viz</strong></td>
<td>"Add an analytics dashboard chart"</td>
<td>Step 3 (domain: chart)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Stack best practices</strong></td>
<td>"React performance tips"、"SwiftUI navigation"</td>
<td>Step 4 (stack search)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">Follow this workflow:</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 1: Analyze User Requirements</h3><a id="user-content-step-1-analyze-user-requirements" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 1: Analyze User Requirements" href="#step-1-analyze-user-requirements"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Extract key information from user request:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Product type</strong>: Entertainment (social, video, music, gaming), Tool (scanner, editor, converter), Productivity (task manager, notes, calendar), or hybrid</li>
<li><strong>Target audience</strong>: C-end consumer users; consider age group, usage context (commute, leisure, work)</li>
<li><strong>Style keywords</strong>: playful, vibrant, minimal, dark mode, content-first, immersive, etc.</li>
<li><strong>Stack</strong>: React Native (this project's only tech stack)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 2: Generate Design System (REQUIRED)</h3><a id="user-content-step-2-generate-design-system-required" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 2: Generate Design System (REQUIRED)" href="#step-2-generate-design-system-required"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Always start with <code>--design-system</code></strong> to get comprehensive recommendations with reasoning:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py &quot;&lt;product_type&gt; &lt;industry&gt; &lt;keywords&gt;&quot; --design-system [-p &quot;Project Name&quot;]"><pre>python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>&lt;product_type&gt; &lt;industry&gt; &lt;keywords&gt;<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> --design-system [-p <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Project Name<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>]</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">This command:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Searches domains in parallel (product, style, color, landing, typography)</li>
<li>Applies reasoning rules from <code>ui-reasoning.csv</code> to select best matches</li>
<li>Returns complete design system: pattern, style, colors, typography, effects</li>
<li>Includes anti-patterns to avoid</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Example:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py &quot;beauty spa wellness service&quot; --design-system -p &quot;Serenity Spa&quot;"><pre>python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>beauty spa wellness service<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> --design-system -p <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Serenity Spa<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 2b: Persist Design System (Master + Overrides Pattern)</h3><a id="user-content-step-2b-persist-design-system-master--overrides-pattern" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 2b: Persist Design System (Master + Overrides Pattern)" href="#step-2b-persist-design-system-master--overrides-pattern"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">To save the design system for <strong>hierarchical retrieval across sessions</strong>, add <code>--persist</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py &quot;&lt;query&gt;&quot; --design-system --persist -p &quot;Project Name&quot;"><pre>python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>&lt;query&gt;<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> --design-system --persist -p <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Project Name<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">This creates:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>design-system/MASTER.md</code> — Global Source of Truth with all design rules</li>
<li><code>design-system/pages/</code> — Folder for page-specific overrides</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>With page-specific override:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py &quot;&lt;query&gt;&quot; --design-system --persist -p &quot;Project Name&quot; --page &quot;dashboard&quot;"><pre>python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>&lt;query&gt;<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> --design-system --persist -p <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Project Name<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> --page <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>dashboard<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">This also creates:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>design-system/pages/dashboard.md</code> — Page-specific deviations from Master</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>How hierarchical retrieval works:</strong></p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>When building a specific page (e.g., "Checkout"), first check <code>design-system/pages/checkout.md</code></li>
<li>If the page file exists, its rules <strong>override</strong> the Master file</li>
<li>If not, use <code>design-system/MASTER.md</code> exclusively</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Context-aware retrieval prompt:</strong></p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="I am building the [Page Name] page. Please read design-system/MASTER.md.
Also check if design-system/pages/[page-name].md exists.
If the page file exists, prioritize its rules.
If not, use the Master rules exclusively.
Now, generate the code..."><pre class="notranslate"><code>I am building the [Page Name] page. Please read design-system/MASTER.md.
Also check if design-system/pages/[page-name].md exists.
If the page file exists, prioritize its rules.
If not, use the Master rules exclusively.
Now, generate the code...
</code></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 3: Supplement with Detailed Searches (as needed)</h3><a id="user-content-step-3-supplement-with-detailed-searches-as-needed" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 3: Supplement with Detailed Searches (as needed)" href="#step-3-supplement-with-detailed-searches-as-needed"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">After getting the design system, use domain searches to get additional details:</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 1: Analyze Requirements</h3><a id="user-content-step-1-analyze-requirements" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 1: Analyze Requirements" href="#step-1-analyze-requirements"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Product type: Tool (AI search engine)</li>
<li>Target audience: C-end users looking for fast, intelligent search</li>
<li>Style keywords: modern, minimal, content-first, dark mode</li>
<li>Stack: React Native</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 2: Generate Design System (REQUIRED)</h3><a id="user-content-step-2-generate-design-system-required-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 2: Generate Design System (REQUIRED)" href="#step-2-generate-design-system-required-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 3: Supplement with Detailed Searches (as needed)</h3><a id="user-content-step-3-supplement-with-detailed-searches-as-needed-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 3: Supplement with Detailed Searches (as needed)" href="#step-3-supplement-with-detailed-searches-as-needed-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Get style options for a modern tool product

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 4: Stack Guidelines</h3><a id="user-content-step-4-stack-guidelines" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 4: Stack Guidelines" href="#step-4-stack-guidelines"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Output Formats</h2><a id="user-content-output-formats" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Output Formats" href="#output-formats"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The <code>--design-system</code> flag supports two output formats:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# ASCII box (default) - best for terminal display
python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py &quot;fintech crypto&quot; --design-system

# Markdown - best for documentation
