python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>fintech crypto<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> --design-system

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Markdown - best for documentation</span>
python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>fintech crypto<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> --design-system -f markdown</pre></div>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tips for Better Results</h2><a id="user-content-tips-for-better-results" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tips for Better Results" href="#tips-for-better-results"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Query Strategy</h3><a id="user-content-query-strategy" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Query Strategy" href="#query-strategy"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Use <strong>multi-dimensional keywords</strong> — combine product + industry + tone + density: <code>"entertainment social vibrant content-dense"</code> not just <code>"app"</code></li>
<li>Try different keywords for the same need: <code>"playful neon"</code> → <code>"vibrant dark"</code> → <code>"content-first minimal"</code></li>
<li>Use <code>--design-system</code> first for full recommendations, then <code>--domain</code> to deep-dive any dimension you're unsure about</li>
<li>Always add <code>--stack react-native</code> for implementation-specific guidance</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Common Sticking Points</h3><a id="user-content-common-sticking-points" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Common Sticking Points" href="#common-sticking-points"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Problem</th>
<th>What to Do</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Can't decide on style/color</td>
<td>Re-run <code>--design-system</code> with different keywords</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Dark mode contrast issues</td>
<td>Quick Reference §6: <code>color-dark-mode</code> + <code>color-accessible-pairs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Animations feel unnatural</td>
<td>Quick Reference §7: <code>spring-physics</code> + <code>easing</code> + <code>exit-faster-than-enter</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Form UX is poor</td>
<td>Quick Reference §8: <code>inline-validation</code> + <code>error-clarity</code> + <code>focus-management</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Navigation feels confusing</td>
<td>Quick Reference §9: <code>nav-hierarchy</code> + <code>bottom-nav-limit</code> + <code>back-behavior</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Layout breaks on small screens</td>
<td>Quick Reference §5: <code>mobile-first</code> + <code>breakpoint-consistency</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Performance / jank</td>
<td>Quick Reference §3: <code>virtualize-lists</code> + <code>main-thread-budget</code> + <code>debounce-throttle</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Pre-Delivery Checklist</h3><a id="user-content-pre-delivery-checklist" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Pre-Delivery Checklist" href="#pre-delivery-checklist"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Run <code>--domain ux "animation accessibility z-index loading"</code> as a UX validation pass before implementation</li>
<li>Run through Quick Reference <strong>§1–§3</strong> (CRITICAL + HIGH) as a final review</li>
<li>Test on 375px (small phone) and landscape orientation</li>
<li>Verify behavior with <strong>reduced-motion</strong> enabled and <strong>Dynamic Type</strong> at largest size</li>
<li>Check dark mode contrast independently (don't assume light mode values work)</li>
<li>Confirm all touch targets ≥44pt and no content hidden behind safe areas</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Common Rules for Professional UI</h2><a id="user-content-common-rules-for-professional-ui" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Common Rules for Professional UI" href="#common-rules-for-professional-ui"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">These are frequently overlooked issues that make UI look unprofessional:
Scope notice: The rules below are for App UI (iOS/Android/React Native/Flutter), not desktop-web interaction patterns.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Icons &amp; Visual Elements</h3><a id="user-content-icons--visual-elements" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Icons &amp; Visual Elements" href="#icons--visual-elements"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Rule</th>
<th>Standard</th>
<th>Avoid</th>
<th>Why It Matters</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>No Emoji as Structural Icons</strong></td>
<td>Use vector-based icons (e.g., Lucide, react-native-vector-icons, @expo/vector-icons).</td>
<td>Using emojis (🎨 🚀 ⚙️) for navigation, settings, or system controls.</td>
<td>Emojis are font-dependent, inconsistent across platforms, and cannot be controlled via design tokens.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Vector-Only Assets</strong></td>
<td>Use SVG or platform vector icons that scale cleanly and support theming.</td>
<td>Raster PNG icons that blur or pixelate.</td>
<td>Ensures scalability, crisp rendering, and dark/light mode adaptability.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Stable Interaction States</strong></td>
<td>Use color, opacity, or elevation transitions for press states without changing layout bounds.</td>
<td>Layout-shifting transforms that move surrounding content or trigger visual jitter.</td>
<td>Prevents unstable interactions and preserves smooth motion/perceived quality on mobile.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Correct Brand Logos</strong></td>
<td>Use official brand assets and follow their usage guidelines (spacing, color, clear space).</td>
<td>Guessing logo paths, recoloring unofficially, or modifying proportions.</td>
<td>Prevents brand misuse and ensures legal/platform compliance.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Consistent Icon Sizing</strong></td>
<td>Define icon sizes as design tokens (e.g., icon-sm, icon-md = 24pt, icon-lg).</td>
<td>Mixing arbitrary values like 20pt / 24pt / 28pt randomly.</td>
<td>Maintains rhythm and visual hierarchy across the interface.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Stroke Consistency</strong></td>
<td>Use a consistent stroke width within the same visual layer (e.g., 1.5px or 2px).</td>
<td>Mixing thick and thin stroke styles arbitrarily.</td>
<td>Inconsistent strokes reduce perceived polish and cohesion.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Filled vs Outline Discipline</strong></td>
<td>Use one icon style per hierarchy level.</td>
<td>Mixing filled and outline icons at the same hierarchy level.</td>
<td>Maintains semantic clarity and stylistic coherence.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Touch Target Minimum</strong></td>
<td>Minimum 44×44pt interactive area (use hitSlop if icon is smaller).</td>
<td>Small icons without expanded tap area.</td>
<td>Meets accessibility and platform usability standards.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Icon Alignment</strong></td>
<td>Align icons to text baseline and maintain consistent padding.</td>
<td>Misaligned icons or inconsistent spacing around them.</td>
<td>Prevents subtle visual imbalance that reduces perceived quality.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Icon Contrast</strong></td>
<td>Follow WCAG contrast standards: 4.5:1 for small elements, 3:1 minimum for larger UI glyphs.</td>
<td>Low-contrast icons that blend into the background.</td>
<td>Ensures accessibility in both light and dark modes.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Interaction (App)</h3><a id="user-content-interaction-app" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Interaction (App)" href="#interaction-app"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Rule</th>
<th>Do</th>
<th>Don't</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Tap feedback</strong></td>
<td>Provide clear pressed feedback (ripple/opacity/elevation) within 80-150ms</td>
<td>No visual response on tap</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Animation timing</strong></td>
<td>Keep micro-interactions around 150-300ms with platform-native easing</td>
<td>Instant transitions or slow animations (&gt;500ms)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Accessibility focus</strong></td>
<td>Ensure screen reader focus order matches visual order and labels are descriptive</td>
<td>Unlabeled controls or confusing focus traversal</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Disabled state clarity</strong></td>
<td>Use disabled semantics (<code>disabled</code>/native disabled props), reduced emphasis, and no tap action</td>
<td>Controls that look tappable but do nothing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Touch target minimum</strong></td>
<td>Keep tap areas &gt;=44x44pt (iOS) or &gt;=48x48dp (Android), expand hit area when icon is smaller</td>
<td>Tiny tap targets or icon-only hit areas without padding</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Gesture conflict prevention</strong></td>
<td>Keep one primary gesture per region and avoid nested tap/drag conflicts</td>
<td>Overlapping gestures causing accidental actions</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Semantic native controls</strong></td>
<td>Prefer native interactive primitives (<code>Button</code>, <code>Pressable</code>, platform equivalents) with proper accessibility roles</td>
<td>Generic containers used as primary controls without semantics</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Light/Dark Mode Contrast</h3><a id="user-content-lightdark-mode-contrast" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Light/Dark Mode Contrast" href="#lightdark-mode-contrast"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Rule</th>
<th>Do</th>
<th>Don't</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Surface readability (light)</strong></td>
<td>Keep cards/surfaces clearly separated from background with sufficient opacity/elevation</td>
<td>Overly transparent surfaces that blur hierarchy</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Text contrast (light)</strong></td>
<td>Maintain body text contrast &gt;=4.5:1 against light surfaces</td>
<td>Low-contrast gray body text</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Text contrast (dark)</strong></td>
<td>Maintain primary text contrast &gt;=4.5:1 and secondary text &gt;=3:1 on dark surfaces</td>
<td>Dark mode text that blends into background</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Border and divider visibility</strong></td>
<td>Ensure separators are visible in both themes (not just light mode)</td>
<td>Theme-specific borders disappearing in one mode</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>State contrast parity</strong></td>
<td>Keep pressed/focused/disabled states equally distinguishable in light and dark themes</td>
<td>Defining interaction states for one theme only</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Token-driven theming</strong></td>
<td>Use semantic color tokens mapped per theme across app surfaces/text/icons</td>
<td>Hardcoded per-screen hex values</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Scrim and modal legibility</strong></td>
<td>Use a modal scrim strong enough to isolate foreground content (typically 40-60% black)</td>
<td>Weak scrim that leaves background visually competing</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Layout &amp; Spacing</h3><a id="user-content-layout--spacing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Layout &amp; Spacing" href="#layout--spacing"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Rule</th>
<th>Do</th>
<th>Don't</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Safe-area compliance</strong></td>
<td>Respect top/bottom safe areas for all fixed headers, tab bars, and CTA bars</td>
<td>Placing fixed UI under notch, status bar, or gesture area</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>System bar clearance</strong></td>
<td>Add spacing for status/navigation bars and gesture home indicator</td>
<td>Let tappable content collide with OS chrome</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Consistent content width</strong></td>
<td>Keep predictable content width per device class (phone/tablet)</td>
<td>Mixing arbitrary widths between screens</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>8dp spacing rhythm</strong></td>
<td>Use a consistent 4/8dp spacing system for padding/gaps/section spacing</td>
<td>Random spacing increments with no rhythm</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Readable text measure</strong></td>
<td>Keep long-form text readable on large devices (avoid edge-to-edge paragraphs on tablets)</td>
<td>Full-width long text that hurts readability</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Section spacing hierarchy</strong></td>
<td>Define clear vertical rhythm tiers (e.g., 16/24/32/48) by hierarchy</td>
<td>Similar UI levels with inconsistent spacing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Adaptive gutters by breakpoint</strong></td>
<td>Increase horizontal insets on larger widths and in landscape</td>
<td>Same narrow gutter on all device sizes/orientations</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Scroll and fixed element coexistence</strong></td>
<td>Add bottom/top content insets so lists are not hidden behind fixed bars</td>
<td>Scroll content obscured by sticky headers/footers</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Pre-Delivery Checklist</h2><a id="user-content-pre-delivery-checklist-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Pre-Delivery Checklist" href="#pre-delivery-checklist-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Before delivering UI code, verify these items:
Scope notice: This checklist is for App UI (iOS/Android/React Native/Flutter).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Visual Quality</h3><a id="user-content-visual-quality" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Visual Quality" href="#visual-quality"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> No emojis used as icons (use SVG instead)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> All icons come from a consistent icon family and style</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Official brand assets are used with correct proportions and clear space</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Pressed-state visuals do not shift layout bounds or cause jitter</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Semantic theme tokens are used consistently (no ad-hoc per-screen hardcoded colors)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Interaction</h3><a id="user-content-interaction" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Interaction" href="#interaction"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> All tappable elements provide clear pressed feedback (ripple/opacity/elevation)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Touch targets meet minimum size (&gt;=44x44pt iOS, &gt;=48x48dp Android)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Micro-interaction timing stays in the 150-300ms range with native-feeling easing</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Disabled states are visually clear and non-interactive</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Screen reader focus order matches visual order, and interactive labels are descriptive</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Gesture regions avoid nested/conflicting interactions (tap/drag/back-swipe conflicts)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Light/Dark Mode</h3><a id="user-content-lightdark-mode" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Light/Dark Mode" href="#lightdark-mode"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Primary text contrast &gt;=4.5:1 in both light and dark mode</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Secondary text contrast &gt;=3:1 in both light and dark mode</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Dividers/borders and interaction states are distinguishable in both modes</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Modal/drawer scrim opacity is strong enough to preserve foreground legibility (typically 40-60% black)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Both themes are tested before delivery (not inferred from a single theme)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Layout</h3><a id="user-content-layout" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Layout" href="#layout"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Safe areas are respected for headers, tab bars, and bottom CTA bars</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Scroll content is not hidden behind fixed/sticky bars</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Verified on small phone, large phone, and tablet (portrait + landscape)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Horizontal insets/gutters adapt correctly by device size and orientation</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> 4/8dp spacing rhythm is maintained across component, section, and page levels</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Long-form text measure remains readable on larger devices (no edge-to-edge paragraphs)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Accessibility</h3><a id="user-content-accessibility" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Accessibility" href="#accessibility"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> All meaningful images/icons have accessibility labels</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Form fields have labels, hints, and clear error messages</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Color is not the only indicator</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Reduced motion and dynamic text size are supported without layout breakage</li>

      class="Link--secondary underline-on-hover border-0 p-0 color-bg-transparent"
      data-action="click:cookie-consent-link#showConsentManagement"
      data-analytics-event="{&quot;location&quot;:&quot;footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;cookies&quot;,&quot;context&quot;:&quot;subfooter&quot;,&quot;tag&quot;:&quot;link&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;cookies_link_subfooter_footer&quot;}"
    >
       Manage cookies
    </button>
  </cookie-consent-link>
</li>

<li class="mx-2">
  <cookie-consent-link>
    <button
      type="button"
      class="Link--secondary underline-on-hover border-0 p-0 color-bg-transparent text-left"
      data-action="click:cookie-consent-link#showConsentManagement"
      data-analytics-event="{&quot;location&quot;:&quot;footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;dont_share_info&quot;,&quot;context&quot;:&quot;subfooter&quot;,&quot;tag&quot;:&quot;link&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;dont_share_info_link_subfooter_footer&quot;}"
    >
      Do not share my personal information
    </button>
  </cookie-consent-link>
</li>

      </ul>
    </nav>
  </div>
</footer>

    <style>
      .user-mention[href$="/1234567mm"] {
        color: var(--color-user-mention-fg);
        background-color: var(--bgColor-attention-muted, var(--color-attention-subtle));
        border-radius: 2px;
        margin-left: -2px;
        margin-right: -2px;
      }
      .user-mention[href$="/1234567mm"]:before,
      .user-mention[href$="/1234567mm"]:after {
        content: '';
        display: inline-block;
        width: 2px;
      }
    </style>
